description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MacOS Build/Test Pyne that runs on MacOS environments. The workflow should trigger on manual dispatch, pull requests that do not modify certain paths, and pushes to certain paths. The workflow should use a matrix strategy to test on macOS 13 and 14, and for each job, check out the repository, set up Miniconda with the latest version and certain channels, and then build and test Pyne using a series of bash commands.
